summary: Decent soundboard recording with improved fidelity and average performance
review: The SBD capture is an improvement over the previous version, offering correct speed and generally normal fidelity though the bass feels a bit thin. The show itself is regarded as unremarkable—neither bad nor great—with no specific standout moments noted.

ai_rating.rationale: Three neutral‑to‑positive reviews point to an average show (70% weight) and a decent but not exceptional soundboard recording (30% weight), yielding a mid‑range rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Improved overall fidelity, correct tape speed, bass slightly lacking compared to other SBD; not the highest quality but clearly better than earlier version.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure or pacing; reviewers described it as an average performance.
